title: Kouchuu Ouja Mushiking Super Battle Movie: Yami no Kaizou Kouchuu
main_page_extract:
Naomi Shindō (進藤 尚美, Shindō Naomi; born November 9, 1972) is a Japanese voice actress who works for Aoni Production. She is best known for her voice roles as Shizuru Fujino (Mai-hime) (as well as her alternate universe counterpart, Shizuru Viola in Mai-Otome), Jane Diethel in Shaman King, Risai in  12 Kingdoms, Elias "Ace" Hono in Shitsugeki! Machine Robo Rescue and Cagalli Yula Athha (Gundam Seed/Gundam Seed Destiny). She was born in Kyoto Prefecture, and her nickname is "Cindy" (シンディー).
In 2023, Shindō announced that Nanako Mori will be replacing her as Cagalli in Mobile Suit Gundam SEED Freedom, which released in January 2024.
